hero.headline:
23 Years of Pools Done Right in
Raleigh
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be your retreat, not your weekend chore. Pool Specialists brings over two decades of CPO-certified expertise to every backyard in the Triangle. We handle the chemistry, the cleaning, and the headaches so you just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Expert Pool Care for<br class="hidden md:block"> Every Need
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full liner replacements, our CPO-certified team has the training and experience to keep your pool in peak condition all year long.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Regular professional cleaning, chemical balancing, and filter maintenance to keep your water crystal clear and swim-ready every single week.

cards.title: Pool Repairs & Equipment
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and plumbing. Most repairs completed same-visit by CPO-certified technicians.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Professional measurement, pattern selection, and installation of vinyl liners. Restore your pool's appearance and stop leaks with a perfect fit.

cards.title: Leak Detection
cards.description: Advanced leak detection technology to pinpoint hidden leaks fast. We find the problem and fix it before it causes costly structural damage.

cards.title: Safety Covers & Winterization
cards.description: Keep your family safe and your pool protected with professional safety cover installation and seasonal opening and closing services.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Professional maintenance for swim clubs, HOA pools, and lifeguarded facilities. Reliable scheduling and full compliance management.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Request Your Free Estimate
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We will provide an honest, no-pressure estimate within 24 hours. Free inspections included with every quote.

steps.title: Our Certified Pros Take Over
steps.description: Our CPO-certified technicians arrive on schedule with the right tools and expertise. Cleaning, chemistry, equipment checks, and repairs are all handled with precision.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Perfect Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season long. Every service is backed by our three-year warranty, so you can relax with total confidence.

about.label: Why Triangle Families Trust Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, CPO-Certified, and Proudly Local Since 2003
about.description: Pool Specialists was founded by Craig Wooster in 2003, starting with large commercial facilities before expanding into residential service in 2005. With over two decades in the Triangle, our team of NSPF CPO-certified technicians brings expert-level knowledge to every pool we touch. As an APSP member and BBB A+ accredited business, we hold ourselves to the highest standards of quality and honesty. We treat your pool like our own.

features.title: CPO-Certified Technicians
features.description: Every technician on our team holds NSPF Certified Pool Operator credentials, ensuring expert-level care for your pool.

features.title: Three-Year Warranty on Services
features.description: We stand behind our work with a three-year warranty and free estimates. No surprises, no hidden costs, just reliable pool care.

features.title: Commercial & Residential Experts
features.description: We started managing large lifeguarded pools. That deep commercial experience means we bring professional-grade standards to every residential pool.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every service comes with a free estimate upfront. Three-year warranties, no hidden fees, and honest pricing you can count on.

guarantee.headline: Our "Pool Pride" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service, we will come back and make it right at no extra charge. With a three-year warranty on our work and an A+ BBB rating backing every job, your satisfaction is not just a promise, it is our standard.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new residential clients are scheduled within one week. For urgent repairs or green pool situations, we offer priority scheduling. Just give us a call at (919) 847-4117 and we will get you on the calendar fast.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in the Triangle?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Raleigh, Durham, Cary, Apex, Chapel Hill, Carrboro, Pittsboro, Knightdale, Garner, Wake Forest, Youngsville, Oxford, Lake Gaston, and surrounding communities. If you are in the Triangle, chances are we cover your area.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every technician on our team is NSPF Certified Pool Operator (CPO) credentialed. Our owner, Craig Wooster, is also a CPO Instructor and teaches certification classes. You are getting the highest level of pool care expertise available.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial and community pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We started with large lifeguarded commercial pools and still manage swim clubs and community facilities across the Triangle. Commercial clients receive dedicated scheduling, compliance management, and detailed service reports.

faqs.question: What kind of warranty do you offer?
faqs.answer: We offer three-year warranties on our services along with free estimates on every job. We are also BBB A+ accredited and committed to making every service right. If something is not perfect, we come back at no charge.

testimonials.name: Swim Club Member
testimonials.text: Pool Specialists maintain the salt water pool at Wood Valley Swim and Racquet where I swim year round. The water is always very clean and pleasant to swim laps in!

testimonials.name: Triangle Homeowner
testimonials.text: We were very pleased when we found Pool Specialists. They have been very responsive, very fair, and just done a great job. Best pool service company we have ever worked with.

testimonials.name: Community Manager
testimonials.text: Pool Specialists does an amazing job maintaining our community pool. Craig and his team are professional and meticulous in keeping the pool and equipment in top shape.

contact.headline:

Can Be Proud Of?
contact.subtitle: Get a free estimate within 24 hours. No pressure, no hidden fees, just honest pool care from a team that has been doing this for over 23 years.
benefits: Free pool inspection with every estimate
